creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri Feb 28 01:35:33 2014
New Revision: 346422
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/346422
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r346422/

Log:
  - Update MASTER_SITE_VIM:
    - Update to latest http:// mirrors
    - Remove dead servers
    - Remove servers without latest patch (7.4.192)
    - Remove all ftp:// mirrors
  
  PR:		ports/179330 (based on)
  Reference:	http://www.vim.org/mirrors.php

Modified:
  head/Mk/bsd.sites.mk

Modified: head/Mk/bsd.sites.mk
==============================================================================

+++ head/Mk/bsd.sites.mk	Fri Feb 28 01:35:33 2014	(r346422)

 .endif
